allow:
Bash(SETUP_DIR="/Users/dev/Downloads/claude-code-setup"
PROJECT_SLUG="url-shortener"
PROJECT_DIR="$SETUP_DIR/projects/$PROJECT_SLUG"

mkdir -p "$PROJECT_DIR"
cp -r "$SETUP_DIR/.claude" "$PROJECT_DIR/.claude"
mkdir -p "$PROJECT_DIR/docs"

cd "$PROJECT_DIR"
git init
git add .claude
git commit -m "chore: init url-shortener with claude scaffold"
echo "DONE: $PROJECT_DIR")

Bash(git branch -m master main && bash .claude/hooks/update-claude-md.sh --name "url-shortener" --type "NEW_PROJECT" --goal "Simplified bit.ly clone with shorten/redirect, hashing, storage, collision handling" --language "Python 3.12 + FastAPI" --phase "PLANNING")
